idea-plugin.name: Jakarta Migration (javax → jakarta)
idea-plugin.description:
Automate Your Java EE to Jakarta EE Migration

Migrate from Java EE 8 (javax.*) to Jakarta EE 9+ seamlessly. This plugin analyzes dependencies, detects migration blockers, and automates refactoring with OpenRewrite.

Why Jakarta EE?

After Oracle donated Java EE to the Eclipse Foundation, the javax.* namespace became jakarta.*. If you're on Java 11+ with Spring Boot 3+ or Jakarta EE, you need this migration.

Key Features

  • 🔍 Migration Analysis - Detect blockers before you start
  • 📦 Dependency Recommendations - Find Jakarta-compatible versions
  • 🤖 AI-Powered - MCP server for Claude, Cursor, and AI Assistants
  • 📊 Dependency Graphs - Visualize your module dependencies
  • ⚡ Auto-Refactoring - OpenRewrite-powered fixes

Supported Technologies

  • Java Versions: Java 11, 17, 21, 25
  • Build Tools: Maven, Gradle
  • Frameworks: Spring Boot 3+, Spring Framework 6+, Jakarta EE 9+
  • Application Servers: Tomcat 10+, WildFly 27+, Jetty 12+, Open Liberty 23+, Payara 7+, JBoss EAP 8+
  • Jakarta Specifications: Jakarta Servlet, JSP, JPA, CDI, Bean Validation, JAX-RS, JAX-WS, JMS, WebSocket, JSON-B, JSON-P

Getting Started

  1. Analyze Your Project: Click "Run Analysis" to scan your project for javax.* dependencies and code
  2. Review Results: Check the Dashboard for migration blockers and dependency recommendations
  3. Plan Your Migration: Use the Migration Strategy tab to choose your approach
  4. Refactor Code: Apply OpenRewrite recipes in the Refactor tab
  5. Verify: Re-run analysis to confirm successful migration

Technical Information

  • Architecture: Built on IntelliJ Platform with OpenRewrite for code transformations
  • Analysis: Static analysis of dependencies, source code, and configuration files
  • Compatibility: Works with IntelliJ IDEA 2023.3+ (Community & Ultimate)
  • AI Integration: MCP server for Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, and other AI assistants

Free vs Premium

  • Free: Analysis, blockers detection, version recommendations
  • Premium: Auto-fixes, one-click refactoring, binary fixes

action.description: Analyze and migrate to Jakarta EE
Analyze project with Jakarta Migration AI Assistant

idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.2
  • Fixed: 'Total Advanced Issues' now at bottom of scan counts
  • Fixed: Removed 'Jakarta Status Indicator' from dashboard
  • Fixed: 'No Jakarta Support' count now updates correctly after scans
  • Fixed: Advanced scans now hidden until premium/trial activated
  • Added: Premium upgrade banner in Support tab
  • Note: Freemium licensing implementation pending - requires JetBrains product parameters and license verification
1.0.1
  • Fixed: Refactor tab now shows actual files changed after applying recipes
  • Fixed: Refactor recipes now properly applied using RefactoringEngine
  • Fixed: Migration strategy phases now have longer, more descriptive text
  • Fixed: JSON deserialization error now shows warning instead of blocking
  • Fixed: Advanced scans tab no longer disappears when switching tabs
  • Fixed: HYBRID strategy replaced with STRANGLER/MICROSERVICES strategy
  • Added: Premium upgrade banner in Support tab for better visibility
  • Improved: Detailed refactoring results showing files processed and changed
1.0.0
  • Initial release to IntelliJ Marketplace
  • Migration readiness analysis for Jakarta EE
  • Dependency analysis and version recommendations
  • Module dependency graph visualization
  • Phased migration planning
  • MCP server integration for AI Assistant
  • OpenRewrite refactoring support
